title: Solar Financing Guide
description: Compare solar loans, leases, PPAs, and cash purchases.
keyTakeaways: Cash has the best lifetime ROI
Loans preserve cash while keeping ownership
Leases and PPAs may lower upfront friction

sections.title: Cash Purchase
sections.content: Cash usually provides the highest long-term savings because there is no interest.

sections.title: Solar Loans
sections.content: Loans can make ownership accessible, but interest increases total cost.

sections.title: Leases and PPAs
sections.content: Leases and PPAs can reduce upfront cost but may limit ownership benefits and incentives.

faqs.question: Which financing option is best?
faqs.answer: It depends on cash availability, credit, tax situation, and how long you plan to stay in the home.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar homeowner resources
IRS residential clean energy credit guidance
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
